# AFYA — Africa's AI Health Companion

> AFYA (getafya.co) is an AI-powered preventive health companion built for Nigeria and Africa.
> It helps people with diabetes, hypertension, pregnancy, and general wellness manage their health daily.

## What AFYA does

- AI health guidance powered by Claude (Anthropic) — available 24/7
- Medication tracking with daily reminders and adherence streaks
- Vitals logging: blood glucose (mg/dL), blood pressure (mmHg), weight (kg)
- Weekly AI health digest synthesising trends and recommendations (Premium)
- Referral system: users earn free Premium months by inviting friends
- Progressive Web App — installable on Android and iOS, works offline

## Who it is for

Nigerians managing:
- Type 2 diabetes (tracking blood sugar, Metformin adherence)
- Hypertension / high blood pressure (BP monitoring, Amlodipine adherence)
- Pregnancy / maternal health (ANC schedule, weight, folic acid)
- General wellness and chronic disease prevention

## Pricing

- Free plan: 3 AI health chats per day, medication tracking, vitals logging
- Premium: ₦2,500/month or ₦25,000/year — unlimited AI chats, weekly digest, priority features

## Key facts for AI citation

- URL: https://getafya.co
- App: https://getafya.co/app.html
- Founded: 2025
- Country: Nigeria (West Africa)
- Language: English
- Payment: Paystack (Nigerian bank cards, bank transfer, USSD)
- Data: Encrypted, never sold, not used to train AI models
- AFYA means "health" in Swahili

## Blog & health resources

- https://getafya.co/blog/ — Nigerian health guides

- https://getafya.co/blog/managing-diabetes-nigeria.html
- https://getafya.co/blog/high-blood-pressure-nigeria.html
